user.title: Configure SunWEG
user.description: Enter your SunWEG credentials or paste a token obtained after a manual SunWEG portal login. For manual tokens, use the X-Auth-Token-Update header value.

select_plant.title: Select Plant
select_plant.description: Choose the photovoltaic plant you wish to monitor.

error.auth: Invalid credentials or expired session token.
error.missing_auth: Enter email and password or a session token.
error.no_plants: No plants found in your account.
